svg.title: SciModelingBench computational systems design tasks
svg.desc: A two-row, three-column scientific montage with the NASBench-101 macro skeleton and its official cell and channel-allocation examples, plus a two-by-two Hopper-v5 panel containing the action-space structure and three simulator rollout states.

text.tspan: NASBench cell search and Hopper-v5 policy ranking from frozen rollouts.
